name: Mcilwain School Bus Lines Inc
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); Private passenger (business) - school students
registry_source: PA Department of State (file.dos.pa.gov); BBB business start date 2/10/1984
notes: Company history per company website confirms founding in 1947 by Robert and Margaret McIlwain; current corporation filed 2/10/1984 per BBB. SAFER physical address differs from input (Johnstown vs Windber); both are McIlwain operating locations. Fleet of 300+ vehicles per company website but FMCSA reports 186 power units (likely only buses operating under USDOT).

name: Franmar School Bus Svc
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); Private passenger - school students
notes: Legal name FRANMAR CORPORATION (DBA Franmar Bus Company / Franmar School Bus Service). Founded operationally 1973; FL incorporation 1/17/1977. Mailing address (Akron OH) reflects ownership by Beacon Mobility, which acquired Franmar in 2023. SAFER address Miami is same property as Cutler Bay 19301 SW 108th Ave (border area). Company website cites 55-bus fleet, transporting 3,000+ students.

name: Eshelman Transportation Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate, for-hire property carrier (also school bus services per company)
registry_source: PA Department of State (file.dos.pa.gov); 'Common Active' for 30+ years per indirect SOS reference
notes: Family-owned, 3rd & 4th generation; per company has 70+ years history (founding ~1950s). FMCSA carrier registered since 03/09/1995. SAFER physical address (Mohnton) is the corporate office; Leesport 100 W Shackamaxon St per input is another operating location. Safety rating Satisfactory dated 03/04/2009. Exact PA filing/incorporation date not retrievable via web search; PA SOS portal returns no public-indexed snippet.

name: Academy Business Co Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate; Authorized For-Hire passenger; School Bus + Private Passenger (Business)
registry_source: NY Department of State Division of Corporations (per BBB - business start 10/13/1961); Academy Bus Co Inc legal name on FMCSA
notes: Input name 'Academy Business Co Inc' appears to be a misspelling/data error for 'Academy Bus Co Inc'. Address (29 Hudson St, Yonkers) matches exactly. Legal name on FMCSA and on NY DOT registry is ACADEMY BUS CO INC. Distinct from larger 'Academy Bus LLC' (USDOT 1771456). Safety Rating Satisfactory dated 04/18/2007; last review 09/19/2013.

name: Tri Star Transport
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); Private property carrier (building materials, machinery, logs/lumber)
registry_source: NY Department of State Division of Corporations (Tri Star Transport Corp); FMCSA registered 03/08/2010
notes: Match is uncertain and likely NOT a student-transportation operator. The only Tri Star Transport in Middletown NY is a property carrier (flatbed/step deck/box truck) with just 1 power unit / 2 drivers, classified as auto repair / freight hauler. Input address 29 Bloomingburg Rd Ste A (auto repair shop) vs FMCSA 335 Bloomingburg Rd - both within Middletown; possibly same operator. MCS-150 outdated (last filed 03/05/2010). Not a school bus operator; may be a data quality/false-positive entry in the source list. Tri Star Transport LLC (USDOT 907272) is a separate, unrelated entity.
